name: 2023 Pop Culture
description: Eras Tour, Barbenheimer, M3GAN, Travis & Taylor — the year's biggest moments in entertainment.

questions.q: Which pop star's 2023 'Eras Tour' became one of the highest-grossing concert tours of all time?

source.notes: Eras Tour grossed over $1 billion in its first year — the first tour ever to do so.

questions.q: Who starred as the title character in 2023's 'Barbie' film?

source.notes: Directed by Greta Gerwig.

questions.q: Which pop star revealed she was pregnant during the 2023 Super Bowl halftime show?

source.notes: Super Bowl LVII halftime; her son Riot Rose was born in August 2023.

questions.q: What name was given to the cultural double-feature phenomenon of two films released July 21, 2023?

source.notes: Barbie + Oppenheimer opened the same weekend. Combined: $235M opening.

questions.q: Which AI doll horror film became a viral 2023 hit thanks to its dance scenes?

source.notes: Released January 2023 by Blumhouse / Universal.

questions.q: Who won the 2023 Best Supporting Actor Oscar for 'Everything Everywhere All at Once'?

source.notes: Quan was the first Asian actor to win the category.

questions.q: Who won the 2023 Best Actress Oscar?

source.notes: First Asian actress to win Best Actress, also for 'Everything Everywhere All at Once'.

questions.q: Which pop star's 2023 'Renaissance World Tour' was a globe-spanning blockbuster?

source.notes: First all-stadium tour by a Black female artist.

questions.q: Who plays Joel in HBO's 2023 hit series 'The Last of Us'?

source.notes: Bella Ramsey co-stars as Ellie.

questions.q: What is the title of Britney Spears's 2023 bestselling memoir?

source.notes: Released October 24, 2023.

questions.q: Which Buffalo Bills player suffered a cardiac arrest on the field in January 2023?

source.notes: Collapsed during MNF vs. Cincinnati on Jan 2; returned to play later in 2023.

questions.q: Which Kansas City Chiefs player became Taylor Swift's high-profile boyfriend in 2023?

source.notes: Tight end for KC; their relationship went public mid-September 2023.

questions.q: What is the title of Prince Harry's 2023 tell-all memoir?

source.notes: Published January 10, 2023; broke records as the fastest-selling nonfiction book in UK history.

questions.q: Which couple announced their divorce in September 2023, ending a 4-year marriage?

source.notes: Married 2019; divorce announced September 2023.

questions.q: What was the unusual amount Gwyneth Paltrow's countersuit was awarded in her 2023 ski-collision trial?

source.notes: Symbolic $1 verdict plus attorneys' fees.

questions.q: Which Atlanta rapper went on trial in 2023 in a sweeping RICO case against his record label?

source.notes: Jeffery Lamar Williams; Georgia RICO trial against the YSL collective.

questions.q: Which 'Vanderpump Rules' cast member was at the center of the 2023 'Scandoval' cheating scandal?

source.notes: Sandoval cheated on Ariana Madix with co-star Raquel Leviss.

questions.q: Which breakout star of FX's 'The Bear' had a star-making 2023, also writing on 'SNL' and 'Big Mouth'?

source.notes: Won Emmy + Golden Globe for The Bear in 2024 for her 2023 work.

questions.q: Which former U.S. House member from New York was expelled from Congress in December 2023?

source.notes: Third House member ever expelled without first being convicted of a crime.

questions.q: Which film won the 2024 Best Picture Oscar for the 2023 film year?

source.notes: Oppenheimer swept 7 Oscars including Best Picture, Director (Christopher Nolan), Actor (Cillian Murphy).
